title: Vikas Mishra
text:
Hello, My name is Vikas Mishra. I am a chip designer by profession and have been doing this for about 25 years. I have worked for companies such as Texas Instruments, Nvidia, Qualcomm, Intel and Google. I have worked on many key chips that have hopefully made the world a sligthly better and a more comfortable place. If you have ever used a DSL modem, or an Android tablet, or a laptop, chances that I have worked on it.
I am trying to learn the new field of Deep Learning. And I am hoping this blog, will help me in documenting my journey.
